response.justification: Exceptional candidate currently working as Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq doing precisely this role—full-stack TypeScript/Node.js development with AI-agent infrastructure and internal tooling. MIT CS degree and 13+ years of development experience far exceed the 6+ year requirement. Possesses demonstrated expertise in primary stack (TypeScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS). Primary concern: Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, and PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned, though the candidate's senior-level background and 'right tool for the job' philosophy suggest rapid acquisition capability.
strengths: Currently Staff Software Engineer doing exact role (full-stack TypeScript/Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure, internal tooling at re:cinq)
MIT CS degree with 13+ years full-stack experience far exceeding 6+ year requirement; proven rapid adoption of new frameworks and technologies
Direct expertise in primary stack: TypeScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and Java
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js experience across multiple frameworks
Vitest and Playwright not listed despite demonstrated TDD expertise (created test framework 'Trial' and fluent-asserts library)
PostgreSQL not mentioned (has MongoDB, MySQL, SQL but not specifically PostgreSQL)

key_factors.factor: Currently Staff SWE at re:cinq doing exactly this work
13+ years experience with MIT degree, far exceeds requirements
Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright, PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned
